nodes.label: Anti-AI-Slop Design Principle
nodes.rationale: Shared directive across many skills to aggressively override LLM defaults: banned fonts (Inter), banned AI purple/blue gradients, no 3-equal-card layouts, no generic placeholder names, no em-dashes, no centered heroes at high variance. Motivated by production observation that LLMs collapse to statistical cliches.

nodes.label: Image-First Design Workflow
nodes.rationale: Mandatory workflow: generate design image(s) first, deeply analyze them, then implement frontend. Prevents generic coded reinterpretations by using generated images as the primary visual source of truth.

nodes.label: Spring Physics Motion Principle
nodes.rationale: Spring-based motion (stiffness:100, damping:20) mandated over linear easing across skills. Provides premium, weighty feel. Animate only transform and opacity for GPU safety.

nodes.label: One Section Per Image Rule
nodes.rationale: imagegen-frontend-web enforces exactly one horizontal image per section to avoid unreadable compressed multi-section boards. Overrides any model default that collapses to a single image.
